rulings.Case Title: SEAN B BARGER VS. DAVID S ANDONIAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD & DECEIT) SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE FRAUDULENT REPRESENTATIONS WITH PARTICULARITY. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SECURITY FRAUD SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE WHERE ALLEGED SECURITY VIOLATIONS TOOK PLACE. DEMURRER TO 1ST, 2ND & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION ON BASIS OF FORWARD LOOKING STATEMENTS OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE. DEMURER TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE NO BASIS FOR FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP. DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION RE ALTA VISTA STATUS AS AIDER AND ABETTOR SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING LEGAL CONCLUSIONS. (CL)
